sourceMovie.title: When Harry Met Sally...
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit When Harry Met Sally... for the same reason it broke through in 1989: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a romance rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Rob Reiner keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The comedy and romance blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Love, Rosie
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If When Harry Met Sally... clicked for you, Love, Rosie (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and romance, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after When Harry Met Sally...?
faq.answer: Try Love, Rosie, Anora, Café Society—each shares DNA with When Harry Met Sally... while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is When Harry Met Sally...?
faq.answer: When Harry Met Sally... (1989) is best described as Comedy, Romance, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is When Harry Met Sally... worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
